description: Create an interactive GeoGebra applet demonstrating Archimedes' method of exhaustion for approximating π. The construction must include a unit circle centered at the origin (0, 0) with radius 1 and an integer slider named 'n' (ranging from 3 to at least 48) that dynamically controls the number of sides for both a regular inscribed n-gon and a regular circumscribed n-gon. Display the numerical lower bound (inscribed polygon's half-perimeter) and upper bound (circumscribed polygon's half-perimeter) for π, along with a text annotation on the Graphics view referencing π and the computed approximation values. Save the completed construction as ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/archimedes_pi.ggb.
